questions.question: Write a function int square(int n) that returns the square of a number. In main(), read an integer and print the square.
Create a function int add(int a, int b) that returns the sum of two numbers. In main(), read two integers and print the result.
Write a function int isEven(int n) that returns 1 if the number is even and 0 if odd. In main(), read a number and print the result.
Write a function int factorial(int n) that returns the factorial of a number using a loop. In main(), read a number and print the factorial.
Create a function int sumArray(int arr[], int size) that returns the sum of all elements in an array. In main(), read 5 integers into an array and print the total sum.
Write a function int max(int a, int b) that returns the larger number. In main(), read two integers and print the maximum.
Write a function int countPositive(int arr[], int size) that counts how many numbers in the array are greater than zero. In main(), read 5 integers and print the count.
Create a function float average(int arr[], int size) that returns the average of array elements. In main(), read 4 numbers and print the average.
Write a function int power(int base, int exp) that calculates base raised to exp using a loop. In main(), read base and exponent and print the result.
Create a function int reverseNumber(int n) that returns the reversed digits of a number. In main(), read a number and print the reversed number.
Write a function int multiply(int a, int b) that multiplies two numbers using repeated addition. In main(), read two numbers and print the result.
Create a function int sumEven(int arr[], int size) that returns the sum of all even numbers in an array. In main(), read 5 integers and print the sum.
Write a function int digits(int n) that returns the number of digits in an integer. In main(), read a number and print the digit count.
Create a function int minArray(int arr[], int size) that returns the smallest value in the array. In main(), read 5 integers and print the smallest number.
Write a function int sumDigits(int n) that returns the sum of digits of a number. In main(), read an integer and print the result.
Create a function int countEven(int arr[], int size) that counts how many even numbers exist in the array. In main(), read 6 integers and print the count.
Write a function int fibonacci(int n) that returns the nth Fibonacci number using a loop. In main(), read n and print the result.
Create a function int countGreater(int arr[], int size, int value) that counts numbers greater than a given value. In main(), read 5 integers and a comparison value, then print the count.
Write a function int gcd(int a, int b) that returns the greatest common divisor of two numbers using a loop. In main(), read two numbers and print the GCD.
Create a function int sumOdd(int arr[], int size) that returns the sum of odd numbers in an array. In main(), read 5 integers and print the sum.
